description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:latest image with the docker:dind service and a before_script that logs in to the GitLab Container Registry using $CI_REGISTRY_USER and $CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD. Define a single stage named build. Add a build job that runs in the build stage, is excluded from the master branch (except master), and executes `docker build --pull -t "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG" .` followed by `docker push "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG"`. Add a build-master job that also runs in the build stage, runs only on the master branch, and executes `docker build --pull -t "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE" .` then `docker push "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE"`.
